scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cchistory/domain build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/storage build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/api build
scripts.build:all:safe: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/api-client build && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=1536 pnpm --filter @cchistory/web build
scripts.dev:api: pnpm --filter @cchistory/domain build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/storage build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/api dev
scripts.probe:smoke: pnpm --filter @cchistory/domain build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters build && node scripts/probe-smoke.mjs
scripts.validate:core: pnpm --filter @cchistory/domain build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/storage build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/api build
